name: event-sdk-ecs
description: Sample on how to use FunctionGraph function to start an ECS instance

scripts.postpack: name=$(bash -c 'echo "${npm_package_name////-}-${npm_package_version}" | sed "s/@/ /g"') && rm -f ${name}.zip && tarball="${name}.tgz"; tar -tf $tarball | sed 's/^package\///' | zip -@r ${name}.zip; rm $tarball
